To test our method, we perform a GstLAL low-latency analysis on forty days of data from the third observing run of LIGO, Virgo, and KAGRA, and show that our method improves the GstLAL results by 5.38% and the subsequent sky location results by 16.75% on average. In addition to this increase in precision, we also show that these results are more accurate as compared to the GstLAL results. This method has been adopted by GstLAL for the fourth observing run.

title: Learning the Universe: The Structure of Dust Attenuation Curves in Galaxy Simulations
background_knowledge: 在天体物理中，星际尘埃对星光的吸收和散射（即尘埃消光/衰减）是影响星系观测性质的关键因素。尘埃会使得星系的光谱能量分布（SED）变红、变暗，尤其在紫外和光学波段。当我们通过 SED 拟合或前向建模来推断星系的物理性质（如恒星质量、恒星形成率、年龄等）时，必须对尘埃衰减曲线进行合理假设。传统上，尘埃衰减曲线通常用经验公式来描述，例如 Calzetti 衰减律（适用于星暴星系）、Cardelli-Clayton-Mathis (CCM) 银河系消光曲线、或者 Small Magellanic Cloud (SMC) 型曲线。这些模型通常包含一个或两个参数（如色余 E(B-V) 和紫外 bump 强度）。然而，越来越多的观测和理论模拟表明，星系中的尘埃衰减曲线形状存在显著的多样性，且与星系的物理性质（如恒星质量、金属丰度、恒星形成率面密度等）密切相关。因此，仅用一两个参数可能无法充分描述这种多样性，从而在星系性质测量中引入系统误差。近年来，一些更复杂的参数化模型被提出，如 Noll 等人 (2009) 的模型（包含 UV 斜率、2175 Å bump 强度和 FUV 斜率等参数），但这些模型的参数数量和具体形式是否最优，仍然缺乏系统的检验。此外，辐射转移模拟（如 SKIRT 代码）能够基于尘埃分布和混合模型计算自洽的衰减曲线，提供了丰富的模拟数据来研究衰减曲线的形态及其与星系特性的关联。
contribution: 本文利用 TNG50 和 TNG100 宇宙学模拟中的星系，通过 SKIRT 辐射转移程序（考虑三种尘埃混合物：银河系、SMC 和恒星尘埃）生成了大量合成的尘埃衰减曲线。作者使用信息有序瓶颈（Information-Ordered Bottleneck, IOB）分析方法证明，恰好四个参数就足以捕获衰减曲线的多样性。基于此，他们采用符号回归（symbolic regression）推导出一个新的、具有可解释性的四参数衰减模型，该模型在恢复衰减曲线和出射流量方面均优于现有参数化方案。这四个参数具有清晰的物理意义：紫外 bump 强度、远紫外斜率、紫外 bump 过渡曲率以及大尺度光学斜率。研究发现，这些参数与星系性质的相关性主要由恒星形成率面密度、金属丰度和恒星-尘埃几何结构所调控，并且在不同的尘埃混合物下基本保持一致——除了对 bump 敏感的参数，它们更依赖于尘埃颗粒的化学成分。此外，作者还提供了符号回归得出的标度关系，将四个参数与可观测的星系性质联系起来，从而为在 SED 拟合和前向建模中无需辐射转移计算即可赋予现实衰减曲线提供了一条物理驱动的途径。
summary: Dust attenuation is a major source of systematic uncertainty in both SED fitting and forward modeling of galaxy populations, yet the functional form used to parameterize attenuation curves has received surprisingly little systematic scrutiny. Particular unanswered questions include: how many free parameters are genuinely needed, and which analytic expression best captures the full diversity of attenuation curve shapes in galaxies across cosmic time? Using a large library of synthetic attenuation curves from TNG50 and TNG100 galaxies post-processed with the SKIRT radiative transfer code using three dust mixtures (Milky Way, SMC, and stellar dust), we show via Information-Ordered Bottleneck analysis that exactly four parameters are needed to capture the diversity of attenuation curves. Guided by this result, we use symbolic regression to derive a new, interpretable four-parameter attenuation model that outperforms existing parameterizations in recovering both attenuation curves and emergent fluxes across all dust mixtures explored. The four parameters of this model have clear physical interpretations: UV bump strength, FUV slope, UV-bump transition curvature, and large-scale optical slope. Their correlations with galaxy properties are primarily regulated by star-formation rate surface density, metallicity, and stellar-dust geometry, and are largely preserved across dust mixtures -- except for the bump-sensitive parameters, which retain a stronger dependence on grain composition. We further provide symbolic-regression scaling relations linking all four parameters to quasi-observable galaxy properties, offering a physically motivated route to assign realistic attenuation curves in SED fitting and forward modeling without radiative-transfer calculations.

title: From Dense Gas Clouds to Supermassive Black Hole Seeds: Hybrid Hydro/Direct $N$-body Simulations of Runaway Collision-driven Intermediate-mass Black Hole Formation
background_knowledge: 超大质量黑洞（SMBH）的种子形成机制是当代天体物理学的核心问题之一。JWST 等望远镜在宇宙早期（红移 z > 6）探测到了质量高达 ~10^9 太阳质量的 SMBH，它们需要在宇宙诞生后不到 10 亿年内形成，这对传统的黑洞增长模型提出了挑战。目前主流的种子模型包括：第一代恒星（Pop III）坍缩形成的轻种子（~100 M_odot）、超大质量气体云直接坍缩形成的重种子（~10^5 M_odot），以及致密星团中通过恒星碰撞形成的中间质量黑洞（IMBH，~10^3 M_odot）。近年来观测发现高红移宇宙中存在许多致密恒星系统，为碰撞形成机制提供了可能的场所。这些系统可能演化为核星团（NSC），其中恒星密度极高，容易发生失控碰撞（runaway collision），从而形成超大质量恒星（VMS），VMS 直接坍缩后形成 IMBH，再通过气体吸积和潮汐瓦解事件（TDE）增长为 SMBH。这一途径不需要预设特殊的种子形成条件，具有自洽性。数值模拟在这一研究中扮演关键角色，通过耦合流体力学、恒星动力学和恒星演化，可以追踪从气体云到黑洞形成的全过程。
contribution: 该论文利用更新版的 Enzo-Abyss 流体力学代码，通过结合直接 N 体方法和恒星演化，自洽地模拟了高红移下致密、贫金属气体云的演化。他们探索了不同湍流强度的影响，发现所有模型中都形成了类似早期核星团的致密星团，并产生了质量在 343 到 5108 太阳质量之间的超大质量恒星（VMS），即使考虑不同强度的星风反馈，失控碰撞过程依然稳健。VMS 直接坍缩后形成中等质量黑洞（IMBH），随后通过爱丁顿极限吸积和潮汐瓦解事件（TDE）增长。在最乐观的模型中，吸积率达到 1.64 × 10^-4 太阳质量每年，TDE 的贡献约占 ~10 Myr 内总吸积量的 23%。假设高红移环境下核星团有持续的气体供应和恒定的 TDE 率，他们预测一个初始质量 6747 太阳质量的 IMBH 可在 100 Myr 内增长至 ~62000 太阳质量。这项研究表明，致密气体云中可以自然形成 VMS，坍缩为 IMBH，并为高红移 SMBH 提供可行的种子，且整个过程在同一自洽框架内实现。
summary: A population of dense stellar systems at high redshift has recently been uncovered by the JWST. To investigate the formation of supermassive black hole (SMBH) seeds in these dense environments without invoking any \textit{ad hoc} seeding mechanisms, we present star cluster-scale simulations performed with an updated version of the hydrodynamics code \texttt{Enzo-Abyss}, which self-consistently integrates the gravity using a direct $N$-body method coupled with stellar evolution. By modeling initially dense, metal-poor gas clouds with varying turbulence, we consistently find the formation of dense clusters resembling early-stage nuclear star clusters (NSCs), as well as the formation of very massive stars (VMSs) ranging from $343\;\mathrm{M_\odot}$ to $5108\;\mathrm{M_\odot}$ via runaway collisions, irrespective of stellar wind feedback strength. Following the direct collapse of these VMSs, the resulting intermediate-mass black holes (IMBHs) grow through Eddington-limited gas accretion and tidal disruption events (TDEs). In our most optimistic model, we find a mass accretion rate of $1.64\times10^{-4}\;\mathrm{M_\odot\;yr^{-1}}$, with TDEs contributing $23\%$ of the total accretion over $\sim10\;\mathrm{Myr}$. Assuming a steady gas supply into the NSC driven by rapid structural assembly in the high-redshift environment, together with a constant TDE rate, we project that an IMBH with an initial mass of $6747\;\mathrm{M_\odot}$ at the center of the NSC can grow to $\sim62000\;\mathrm{M_\odot}$ within $100\;\mathrm{Myr}$ of its formation. Our numerical study, conducted within a single self-consistent framework that incorporates the essential physical processes, suggests that VMSs can form in dense gas clouds, collapse into IMBHs, and subsequently provide viable seeds for the SMBHs observed at high redshift.

title: A universal model for the accretion rates and formation times of dark matter halos
background_knowledge:
在宇宙学标准模型（ΛCDM）中，暗物质晕（dark matter halo）是宇宙结构形成的基本单元。微小的原初密度扰动在引力不稳定性作用下逐渐增长，首先坍缩形成暗物质晕，成为随后星系形成的“骨架”。暗物质晕通过吸积周围物质和与其他晕的并合而不断增长质量，其质量吸积历史（mass accretion history）直接决定了晕内星系获取气体的速率，从而影响星系恒星形成率、形态和演化。因此，暗物质晕的质量吸积率（mass accretion rate, MAR）和形成时间（formation time）是连接宇宙学与星系物理的关键桥梁。
早期研究尝试基于扩展 Press-Schechter（EPS）理论（如 Lacey & Cole 1993）解析描述暗物质晕的聚束与增长，但这些模型在低质量端和高红移处常存在偏差。随着高分辨率N体数值模拟的进步，研究者得以直接测量晕的增长历史，并发现MAR受多种因素影响，包括晕质量、红移、宇宙学参数以及局部环境。近年来，许多工作致力于构建更精确、更普适的拟合公式，以描述不同宇宙学模型下暗物质晕的增长率，为半解析星系形成模型和流体动力学模拟的子网格物理提供关键参考。同时，区分暗物质专用（DM-only）模拟与包含重子物理的流体动力学模拟中晕的增长差异，对于理解重子物理过程对晕结构的影响也至关重要。
contribution: 本文利用暗物质专用数值模拟和流体动力学模拟，系统测量了在两种极端宇宙学（ΛCDM 和 Einstein-de Sitter）背景下，红移0到14范围内暗物质晕的质量吸积率（MAR）和半质量形成时间。主要发现包括：（1）无论采用纯暗物质还是含重子的流体动力学模拟，MAR的结果几乎完全一致，表明重子物理过程对整体晕质量吸积的影响很小；（2）MAR随晕质量和红移的增大而单调增加；（3）构建了一个普适的六参数拟合函数，以三个物理量——峰值高度 ν（peak height）、线性功率谱斜率 n_eff 和有效线性增长率 α_eff——作为变量，能够精确描述 MAR 的行为；（4）改进了经典 Lacey & Cole 模型中关于形成红移的公式，通过将其中一个参数固定为物理值并引入对 n_eff 的依赖，得到了双参数拟合形式，显著提升了在高红移和低质量端的精度。该模型已被纳入公开工具包 Colossus，为相关研究提供了便捷、高精度的工具。
summary: The formation histories of halos set the baseline rate at which galaxies accrete gas over cosmic time. While a number of models describe these histories and their derivative, the mass accretion rate (MAR), a simple and universal formula has remained elusive. Here we measure the median MARs and half-mass formation times of halos in dark matter-only and hydrodynamical simulations, in extremely different cosmologies ($Λ$CDM and Einstein-de Sitter), and across a wide range of redshifts ($z = 0$-$14$). We confirm that MARs increase with mass and redshift, and that they are virtually identical in hydrodynamical and dark matter-only simulations. We show that MARs are accurately described by a universal six-parameter function of three physical variables: the peak height $ν$, the slope of the linear power spectrum $n_{\rm eff}$, and the effective linear growth rate $α_{\rm eff}$. A complementary two-parameter fit for the formation redshift improves on the function of Lacey \& Cole by fixing one parameter to its physical value and adding a dependence on $n_{\rm eff}$. Our model is broadly consistent with some prescriptions from the literature but provides a larger range and higher accuracy at high redshifts and low masses. Our fitting functions are implemented in the publicly available \textsc{Colossus} toolkit.

title: Geometric Matching of Local Static Regions in Cosmological Spacetimes with an Evolving Lapse
background_knowledge: 在标准宇宙学中，我们的宇宙在大尺度上由 Friedmann–Lemaître–Robertson–Walker (FLRW) 度规描述，其时间坐标和空间部分通过尺度因子 a(t) 相互耦合。这个度规中隐含了一个基本假设：宇宙时间的方向由“流逝函数”（lapse function）N(t) 规定，它通常被设定为 1，意味着坐标时与固有时一致。然而，类如标量–张量理论等修正引力模型常引入随时间演化的流逝函数，以探索超越 ΛCDM 的可能物理。这类修改面临一个核心挑战：如何确保局部天体物理系统（如太阳系、脉冲双星）内的物理规律不受宇宙膨胀的干扰？在广义相对论中，经典的 Einstein–Straus 模型通过将静态施瓦西解作为“液泡”（vacuole）嵌入 FLRW 背景，在边界上利用 Israel 衔接条件（连续性要求：诱导度规和外曲率没有跳变）来保证无物质薄层的匹配，从而实现了局部静态与全局膨胀的共存。当流逝函数不再是常数时，这样的匹配问题变得非平凡：背景宇宙时间与局部固有时可能不同步，因此需要寻找一种“几何一致性条件”（geometric consistency condition），以确保局部静态区域能平滑地嵌入到具有演化流逝的宇宙时空中，而无需引入额外的动力学场或屏蔽机制。
contribution: 本工作在“广义宇宙时”（Generalized Cosmological Time, GCT）框架下——其中流逝函数取为 N(t) ∝ a(t)^{b/4} 的形式——系统研究了静态施瓦西内部区与膨胀 FLRW 外部区之间的几何匹配。通过将静态施瓦西解嵌入 GCT–FLRW 背景，并运用 Israel 衔接条件，推导了在无薄层假设下允许匹配的背景膨胀类型。关键结果是：外曲率连续条件自然导出与 GCT 背景运动方程完全一致的 Friedmann 型关系，该关系并非新的动力学方程，而应被解释为衔接所要求的“几何一致性条件”。这一条件表明，即便宇宙学背景采用与局部固有时不同的时间归一化，只要满足该一致性关系，局部拥有固定时钟的静态引力系统便能自洽地存在于具有演化流逝的宇宙时空中。该分析因此澄清了在超越标准模型的时间参数化下，局部物理的标准描述如何得以保持。
summary: The generalized cosmological time (GCT) framework introduces a modified lapse function, N(t)\propto a^{b/4}, as a geometric extension of the standard FLRW description. Like other departures from $Λ$CDM, such constructions must remain compatible with the observed stability of local gravitational and laboratory physics. In scalar--tensor theories, this compatibility is usually achieved through dynamical screening mechanisms that suppress additional degrees of freedom in dense environments. In this work, we examine whether a locally static spacetime region can be consistently embedded within a cosmological background described by a time-dependent lapse. By embedding a static Schwarzschild interior into an expanding GCT--FLRW exterior, the Israel junction conditions are used to determine the class of background expansions that admit such a matching in the absence of a thin shell. The continuity of the extrinsic curvature yields a Friedmann-type relation that coincides with the GCT background equations of motion. This relation should be interpreted not as a new dynamical equation, but as a geometric consistency condition (GCC) associated with the matching of the two spacetime regions. In this sense, the junction does not introduce new dynamics, but provides a GCC under which a region with fixed local clocks can be embedded in a cosmological spacetime with an evolving lapse. Therefore, the analysis clarifies how locally static gravitational systems can remain compatible with a cosmological time normalization that differs from that of local proper time while preserving the standard description of local physics.

title: Optical-morphology-based assessment of astrometric quality in Gaia-CRF3 quasars
background_knowledge:
在天体测量学中，建立高精度的天球参考架（Celestial Reference Frame）是研究天体位置和运动的基础。Gaia 卫星通过其超高精度的天体测量，构建了第三代天体参考架 Gaia-CRF3，其中活动星系核（AGN）因其遥远且理论上点状的特征，被选作理想的位置基准。然而，许多 AGN 在光学波段并非严格的点源：其寄主星系或延展喷流等结构使得源的光度轮廓偏离点扩散函数（PSF），从而在 Gaia 的视差和自行测量中引入系统误差。这类由源形态引起的天体测量偏差不仅影响单个源的参数，还可能在参考架的全局解算中产生额外的旋转、变形等系统效应。因此，准确评估 AGN 的点源程度，并量化其形态对天体测量精度的影响，已成为提升参考架构建质量、改进视差零点校正模型的关键课题。

过去的研究已指出 Gaia DR3 中部分 AGN 的异常视差和自行与其延展形态有关，但缺乏一个统一、不依赖于 Gaia 数据的外部形态指标来系统评估 Gaia-CRF3 中的源。为此，天文学家尝试结合多个地面巡天的形态参数，通过机器学习方法为海量 AGN 提供一个可靠的点源评分，从而更深入地分析形态引入的系统误差。
contribution: 本研究基于 DESI、SDSS、SkyMapper 等巡天的形态参数，并以 PS1-PSC 点源打分作为统一参考尺度，利用 XGBoost 模型为 Gaia-CRF3 中的 1,607,490 个源（占完整星表的 99.59%）推导了外部形态评分。该评分范围 0～1，对于 G < 20.85 mag 的源可靠。利用这一指标，作者发现形态显著偏离点源的 AGN 会产生约 -43.7 μas 的视差零点偏移，且当前的视差零点校正模型无法有效消除此偏移。此外，不同评分区间筛选出的参考源子样本在全天自行场上表现出显著差异：当只选取点源评分 > 0.95 的高纯度点源时，整个参考架的旋转幅度相比全部 Gaia-CRF3 样本降低了 15.8%。这一工作不仅提供了一个独立于 Gaia 的形态评估工具，也为后续天体测量参数的系统误差修正和参考架优化提供了重要依据。
summary: Context. Several studies have shown that host-galaxy structure or extended optical morphology in AGNs can induce spurious parallaxes and proper motions in Gaia DR3. However, it remains unclear whether source morphology also introduces systematic errors into the celestial reference frame constructed from Gaia data. Aims. We aim to provide a Gaia-independent external morphological indicator for Gaia-CRF3 sources and to use it to quantify the astrometric systematics associated with source morphology. Methods. Using morphological parameters derived from DESI, SDSS, and SkyMapper, together with the PS1-PSC point-source score as a common reference scale, we used XGBoost to infer external morphological scores for Gaia-CRF3 sources. We then developed a multi-survey fusion scheme to combine the four survey-based point-source scores into a single composite score that measures the degree to which each source departs from the morphology of an ideal point source. Results. We obtained morphological scores for 1,607,490 Gaia-CRF3 sources, corresponding to a completeness of 99.59\% with respect to the full Gaia-CRF3 catalogue. The score ranges from 0 to 1 and remains reliable for sources with $G<20.85$ mag. Based on this indicator, we find that AGNs with strongly non-point-like morphology induce a parallax zero-point shift of about $-43.7\,μ$as, which cannot be effectively removed by the current parallax zero-point correction model. We also find that reference-source subsamples selected in different score ranges exhibit significantly different all-sky proper motion fields. For the high-purity point-source subsample with \texttt{point\_score} > 0.95, the total frame spin amplitude is reduced by 15.8\% relative to that of the full Gaia-CRF3 sample.

title: Hector Galaxy Survey: Linking the low- and high-mass ends of the initial mass function in star-forming galaxies
background_knowledge: 恒星初始质量函数（Initial Mass Function, IMF）描述了新诞生恒星的质量分布，是星系演化研究中最为基础的物理参量之一。它决定了恒星群体中不同质量恒星的数量比例，进而深刻影响星系的光度、颜色、化学增丰历史、反馈过程以及恒星质量测定等关键可观测量。传统上，天文学界普遍采用一种“普适”的 IMF，例如Salpeter（1955）提出的单一幂律形式（斜率约为 -2.35）、Kroupa（2001）的分段幂律或 Chabrier（2003）的对数正态形式，并默认其在宇宙各处、各种环境中保持不变。然而，近二十年来越来越多的观测证据表明，IMF 可能并非完全普适。在局部宇宙中，早型星系（椭圆星系）的光谱吸收线特征、动力学测量以及引力透镜等独立方法均暗示其 IMF 的低质量端可能更加“头重”（bottom-heavy），即低质量恒星比例偏高；而一些星暴星系或高红移星系的高质量端 IMF 则可能更加“顶重”（top-heavy），即大质量恒星比例更高。这些变化直接关系到我们如何将观测到的积分光转化为星系物理参数，也影响到星系演化半解析模型和数值模拟的准确性。目前，对 IMF 两端的同时约束仍然极具挑战性：低质量端主要影响星系中低质量恒星的累积光度，可通过恒星光谱中某些敏感吸收线（如 Na I 双线、FeH 翼等）来限制，但往往只能反映星系长时间尺度的平均恒星形成历史；高质量端则主导了电离光子产额、超新星发生率等，可通过 Hα 等发射线或红外光度等示踪近期（<1千万年）的恒星形成活动。将两种时标不同的探针联合起来，是连接星系长期演化与近期过程、全面刻画 IMF 形态的关键步骤，也为理解 IMF 变化的物理驱动因素（如金属丰度、恒星形成率、星系质量等）提供了重要线索。
contribution:
本研究利用 Hector 积分场光谱巡天数据，对 214 个恒星形成星系首次同时分析了 IMF 的低质量端和高质量端斜率。具体工作与发现包括：

- **方法**：低质量端 IMF 斜率通过恒星群体合成拟合光谱吸收特征获得，拟合中允许恒星形成历史具有延展性，以反映长期平均的 IMF；高质量端 IMF 斜率则采用 Kennicutt 诊断方法，对比观测的 Hα 等值宽度与 g-r 颜色与恒星群体合成模型预测。

- **IMF 形态的多样性**：星系之间的 IMF 形状呈现显著差异，并且低质量端与高质量端 IMF 斜率之间存在微弱但统计上稳健的正相关。

- **与星系物理参数的关系**：两个 IMF 斜率均与星系恒星质量、恒星形成活动强度及金属丰度 [M/H] 显著相关。总体趋势为：更高的恒星质量、更强的恒星形成活动以及更高的金属丰度，往往对应着既“头重”（低质量恒星比例高）又“顶重”（大质量恒星比例高）的 IMF。

- **驱动因素的解耦**：偏相关分析揭示，低质量端 IMF 斜率主要受金属丰度 [M/H] 驱动，而高质量端 IMF 斜率则主要与恒星质量及近期恒星形成有关。由于低质量端反映的是星系长期平均的 IMF，高质量端只捕捉近期恒星形成，这表明塑造 IMF 两端的物理过程可能发生在不同且可能解耦的时间尺度上。

- **科学意义**：这些结果挑战了 IMF 的普适性假设，强调星系演化和恒星群体合成模型有必要引入灵活的 IMF 描述。正确计入这类变化，对于构建一个 IMF 自洽的星系宇宙时演化图景至关重要。
summary: The stellar initial mass function (IMF) is a fundamental ingredient in galaxy evolution, linking observed integrated light to galaxy properties. Constraining the full IMF shape beyond the Milky Way remains challenging, as most studies focus either on the low-mass end of quiescent galaxies or the high-mass end of star-forming galaxies. Here we present the first simultaneous analysis of both ends of the IMF in 214 star-forming galaxies from the Hector survey. We estimate the low-mass end slope using a stellar population approach that fits IMF-sensitive absorption features with extended star formation histories, while the high-mass end slope is derived via the Kennicutt diagnostic, which compares the observed H-alpha equivalent width and g-r colour with stellar population synthesis model predictions. We find substantial diversity in IMF shapes and a weak but statistically robust correlation between the low- and high-mass IMF slopes. Both IMF slopes show significant correlations with stellar mass, star formation activity, and stellar metallicity ([M/H]). In general, higher stellar mass, stronger star formation activity, and higher metallicity are associated with both bottom-heavy and top-heavy IMFs. Partial correlation analysis reveals that the low-mass end slope is primarily driven by [M/H], whereas the high-mass end is mainly linked to stellar mass and recent star formation. Because the low-mass end slope traces the IMF over long-term averages and the high-mass end slope captures only recent star formation, the processes shaping each end likely occur over different and possibly decoupled timescales. Our findings challenge the universality of the IMF and emphasise the need for galaxy evolution and stellar population models to incorporate a flexible IMF prescription. Accounting for these variations is essential to build an IMF-consistent picture of galaxy evolution across cosmic time.

title: The dynamics of the Anglerfish cluster
background_knowledge:
星系团是宇宙中最大的引力束缚结构，由暗物质、数百至数千个星系以及弥漫的热气体（即星系团内介质，简称 ICM）组成。ICM 温度可达数千万度，主要在 X 射线波段发出辐射。星系团通过合并过程不断增长质量，合并事件是结构形成中最剧烈的能量释放过程之一，能够驱动激波、湍流，并加速粒子产生非热辐射，如射电晕和射电遗迹。

对合并星系团的多波段研究，尤其是 X 射线和射电联合分析，是理解宇宙大尺度结构形成历史、暗物质性质以及星系团热力学演化的关键途径。然而，由于投影效应，观测中常出现表观上的子结构偏离，需要借助动力学重构来还原三维几何。其中，冷核（cool core）是指星系团中心密度高、温度低的区域，它在合并过程中可能被剥离、偏转甚至幸存，其所伴随的冷锋（cold front）和激波前沿是探测 ICM 流体动力学的重要探针。
contribution:
本文利用 XMM-Newton 和 Chandra 的高空间分辨率 X 射线数据，结合 Meerkat 射电观测和辅助光学数据，系统研究了复杂大质量星系团 MACS0600（昵称“ Anglerfish cluster”）的并合动力学。

主要发现包括：
- 星系团的 X 射线形态高度扰动，呈现多个子结构，且大尺度射电辐射的主体与 X 射线峰值之间存在明显的空间偏离。
- 在 X 射线峰值处探测到一个被更热气体包裹的致密冷核，其外围的面亮度间断符合冷锋特征，表明冷核正在穿过主团热气体。
- 中心区域温度升高且集中了大部分弥漫射电辐射，暗示并合驱动的湍流正在加速粒子。
- 光学数据进一步支持冷核与主团沿视线方向存在相对运动。

综合判断，MACS0600 正在经历一次并合事件：一个致密冷核已经穿越了质量更大的主星系团，虽未完全瓦解，但显著扰动了周围的 ICM。该工作展示了多波段联合分析在揭示并合星系团真实三维结构中的重要作用。
summary: Merging galaxy clusters represent the ideal laboratory to test our understanding of the large scale structure formation history and the processes involved. While many merging clusters have been identified, only a limited number have been studied in detail through multi-wavelength analysis and dynamical reconstruction, this type of analysis being crucial to account for projection degeneracies. This work investigates the merger dynamics of the massive and complex cluster MACS0600 using high spatial, $\sim 15$ arcsec, radio and X-ray datasets in combination with ancillary optical data. We analyze the cluster morphology and the thermodynamic properties of the intracluster medium (ICM) through XMM-Newton and Chandra X-ray observations, and explore the non-thermal component via diffuse radio emission observed with Meerkat. We find a disturbed X-ray morphology with multiple substructures and a clear offset between the bulk of the radio emission and the X-ray peak. At the location of the X-ray peak, we detect a compact cool core surrounded by hotter gas and associated with a surface brightness discontinuity consistent with a cold front. The central region exhibits elevated temperatures and hosts most of the diffuse radio emission, suggesting merger-driven turbulence. Optical data further support a relative motion between the cool core and the main cluster along the line of sight. We conclude that MACS0600 is undergoing a merger in which a compact cool core has crossed the main, more massive cluster without being completely disrupted, while significantly perturbing the surrounding ICM.

title: The Extreme Quasar Main Sequence of Super-Eddington DESI-DR1 NLSy1 Galaxies
background_knowledge: 活动星系核 (AGN) 的光学多样性可以用“类星体主序”或本征矢量 1 (Eigenvector 1, EV1) 来描述，它将不同光谱特征的 AGN 排列在一个连续的参数空间内。该主序主要关联宽发射线的等值宽度、Fe II 发射的相对强度以及 Hβ 宽线的半峰全宽 (FWHM) 等观测量。窄线 Seyfert 1 星系 (NLSy1) 位于主序的高吸积率末端，通常具有较小的 BH 质量、较高的吸积率 (接近甚至超过爱丁顿极限) 以及强烈的 Fe II 发射。近年来，高红移早期宇宙中发现了过于庞大的黑洞，这暗示黑洞可能存在快速增长的阶段。为了理解这一过程，天文学家转向近邻宇宙中的低质量、超爱丁顿吸积源，将其作为早期宇宙黑洞快速增长的“本地类比”。这些极端吸积天体的统计样本对于限制黑洞增长模型至关重要。传统光谱巡天 (如 SDSS) 已证认了大量 NLSy1，但受限于灵敏度，可能在极端参数空间存在统计不完备性。新一代深场巡天 (如 DESI) 以其更高的灵敏度，有望揭示此前缺失的、更低光度或更极端性质的 NLSy1 群体，从而更完整地描绘 AGN 主序的高吸积率尾部。
contribution:
本研究利用暗能量光谱仪巡天 (DESI) 第一年发布的数据 (DR1) 证认了一个包含 18,749 个 NLSy1 星系的样本，并将其映射到 EV1 平面上，以判定它们是否代表一类独特的超吸积群体。通过与 SDSS DR17 的 NLSy1 样本进行系统比较，主要发现如下：
- DESI 的 NLSy1 群体在 EV1 参数空间中整体向极端端移动，表现出更强的 Fe II 发射 (中值 log R4570 = -0.03，而 SDSS 样本为 -0.31)，R4570 为 Fe II 复合体相对于 Hβ 的强度比。
- DESI 源的中心黑洞质量普遍更低 (中值 log M_BH ≈ 6.73 太阳质量)，而 SDSS 样本的中值在 6.77 至 6.91 之间。
- 在连续谱光度可比的情况下，DESI 样本中有更大比例 (43.8%–47.7%) 的天体超过爱丁顿极限 (log 爱丁顿比率 > 0)，相比之下 SDSS 样本仅为 20.6%–37.4%。
这些结果表明，DESI 的高灵敏度成功揭露了一个以往巡天中大量缺失的低质量、超爱丁顿吸积 AGN 群体。这些极端 EV1 天体自然地产生观测到的强 Fe II 发射，为研究早期宇宙黑洞快速增长提供了宝贵的本地统计样本。
summary: The quasar main sequence, or Eigenvector 1 (EV1), describes the optical diversity of active galactic nuclei (AGN), with Narrow-Line Seyfert 1 (NLSy1) galaxies anchoring the high-accretion end. Recent discoveries of overly massive black holes in the early Universe highlight the need to study local, low-mass super-Eddington accretors as analogs of rapid black hole growth. We map a population of 18,749 NLSy1 galaxies identified in the Dark Energy Spectroscopic Instrument Data Release 1 (DESI DR1) onto the EV1 plane to determine whether they represent a distinct population of super-accretors. We compare the spectral properties of the DESI DR1 NLSy1 sample with the SDSS DR17 NLSy1 catalog. We extract key parameters, including the broad H-beta full width at half maximum (FWHM) and Fe II strength (R4570). To evaluate their accretion states, we derive single-epoch virial black hole masses using an Fe II strength-dependent scaling relation and an Eddington rate-dependent fundamental plane. The DESI DR1 NLSy1 population shows a shift toward the extreme end of the EV1 parameter space, with stronger Fe II emission (median log R4570 = -0.03) than the SDSS sample (-0.31). Furthermore, the DESI sources host less massive black holes (median log black hole mass ~6.73) than the SDSS objects (6.77-6.91). Given comparable continuum luminosities, a larger fraction of the DESI sample (43.8%-47.7%) exceeds the Eddington limit (log Eddington ratio > 0) than the SDSS sample (20.6%-37.4%). The sensitivity of DESI has unveiled a large population of low-mass, super-Eddington accreting AGN largely missing from previous surveys. These extreme EV1 objects naturally produce the observed intense Fe II emission. This unique sample provides a statistical dataset of local super-Eddington accretors for understanding early-Universe black hole growth.

title: Narrow-Line Seyfert 1 Galaxies in the Dark Energy Spectroscopic Instrument Data Release 1
background_knowledge:
活动星系核（Active Galactic Nuclei, AGN）是位于星系中心的超大质量黑洞通过吸积周围物质而释放出巨大电磁辐射的致密区域，其辐射覆盖从射电到伽马射线的全电磁波段。根据光学光谱中的发射线特征，AGN 可被划分为不同类型，其中赛弗特星系（Seyfert galaxies）是低光度 AGN 的代表。赛弗特星系按照发射线宽度分为两类：I 型赛弗特同时具有宽发射线（起源于靠近黑洞的高速气体云，宽线区）和窄发射线（起源于更远的窄线区）；II 型赛弗特仅显示窄发射线。统一模型认为，这些差异来自观测者视线方向相对于环核尘埃环的取向。

窄线赛弗特 I 型星系（Narrow-Line Seyfert 1, NLSy1）是赛弗特 I 型的一个特殊子类，传统上依据以下光谱标准定义：氢巴尔末线系（尤其是 Hβ）的宽发射线较窄（半高全宽 FWHM < 2000 km/s）、[O III] 与 Hβ 的流量比值低（通常 [O III]/Hβ < 3）、且存在强烈的铁 Fe II 多次发射线。这些特征暗示着 NLSy1 的中心黑洞质量相对较低（典型值在 10^6 - 10^8 太阳质量之间），但吸积率较高，往往接近甚至超过爱丁顿极限。NLSy1 常展现出极端的 X 射线谱特性（如陡峭的软 X 射线超出）、快速剧烈的高能光变，以及从射电静默到射电噪的多样化射电辐射行为。因此，NLSy1 是研究黑洞吸积物理、喷流形成机制以及种子黑洞生长和反馈的理想实验室。过去的大规模光谱巡天（如斯隆数字化巡天 Sloan Digital Sky Survey, SDSS）已基于光学光谱证认了数千例 NLSy1，但由于其深度和覆盖天区的限制，仍可能遗漏了大量低光度成员，利用新一代深度巡天数据进一步拓展 NLSy1 样本对理解这类特殊天体的整体统计性质至关重要。
contribution: 这项工作首次利用暗能量光谱仪（Dark Energy Spectroscopic Instrument, DESI）第一轮公开数据发布（Data Release 1, DR1）中的高信噪比光学光谱，构建了全新的窄线赛弗特 I 型星系（NLSy1）目录。研究者对超过 71,000 条未包含在 SDSS 目录中的、红移 z < 0.9 的活动星系核光谱进行了详细的光谱分解，从中识别出 18,749 个此前未被记录的 NLSy1 天体，并同时提供了一个宽线赛弗特 I 星系的补充样本。通过与在红移和绝对 B 波段星等上匹配的 SDSS-NLSy1 样本进行对比，发现 DESI-NLSy1 样本倾向于具有略高的热光度和更低的黑洞质量（尽管弥散较大），从而系统性地具有更高的爱丁顿比率。此外，在射电、X 射线和伽马射线现有巡天表中，DESI-NLSy1 源的多波段探测比例显著低于 SDSS-NLSy1，暗示 DESI 可能揭示了低光度 NLSy1 群体的未被发掘部分。本文提供的目录已公开发布，为今后对这类谜样 AGN 进行更深度的多波段研究奠定了基础。
summary: Narrow-line Seyfert 1 (NLSy1) galaxies are peculiar active galactic nuclei (AGN) known to exhibit a variety of intriguing observational features from low-frequency radio waves to high-energy $γ$~rays. As of now, NLSy1 catalogs are primarily based on optical spectroscopic observations from the Sloan Digital Sky Survey (SDSS). Here we report, for the first time, a new catalog of NLSy1 galaxies using the high-quality optical spectroscopic observations made public in the first data release of the Dark Energy Spectroscopic Instrument (DESI). We performed a detailed spectral decomposition of more than 71,000 optical spectra of AGN not included in the SDSS catalog and located at $z<0.9$. From this sample, we identify 18749 objects as NLSy1 galaxies for the first time. We also supplement the NLSy1 catalog with a sample of broad-line Seyfert 1 galaxies. The NLSy1 galaxies identified in the DESI data tend to have slightly higher bolometric luminosities and lower black hole masses (though with large dispersions), leading to the higher Eddington ratios than those of the SDSS-NLSy1 sample matched in redshifts and absolute $B$-band magnitudes. Moreover, the fraction of DESI-NLSy1 galaxies detected in the radio, X-ray, and $γ$-ray catalogs was found to be lower than that of SDSS-NLSy1 sources. We conclude that deeper multiwavelength investigations of these enigmatic AGN will help unravel the low-luminosity end of the NLSy1 population. The catalog has been made available at https://www.ucm.es/blazars/seyfert and Zenodo https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20484681.

title: The Ohio SETI Program -- The Last Decades
background_knowledge: 搜寻地外文明（SETI）是天文学中一个充满想象力的分支，旨在通过探测宇宙中可能存在的技术信号（technosignatures），寻找地外智慧生命的证据。自 20 世纪中叶以来，射电波段一直是 SETI 的主要窗口，因为窄带射电信号几乎不可能由自然天体物理过程产生，且能够有效穿透星际介质。1960 年，弗兰克·德雷克（Frank Drake）的奥兹玛计划（Project Ozma）首次利用射电望远镜监听特定恒星，开启了现代 SETI 的实践。此后，世界各地的射电设施被用于 SETI 观测，包括通过分布式计算分析数据的 SETI@home 项目，以及近年来大规模巡天的突破聆听（Breakthrough Listen）计划。一般而言，SETI 观测分为两类：一是针对邻近恒星系统的瞄准搜索（targeted search），二是对大范围天空的盲巡天（blind survey）。搜索的目标通常是频率-时间图中孤立的窄带信号，以及可能指示非自然来源的重复或漂移特征。在这段历史中，俄亥俄州立大学射电天文台（OSURO，又称大耳朵）扮演了独特角色——它是首个专职从事 SETI 的观测站，从 1973 年到 1998 年连续运行，积累了前所未有的长期巡天数据。
contribution: 本文系统回顾了俄亥俄 SETI 项目最后几十年的发展历程，涵盖其仪器、巡天策略、科学发现与科学遗产。该项目的接收机系统从最初的 8 通道氢线接收机逐步升级为更复杂的巡天设备，利用基本一致的观测配置扫描了约 70% 的射电天空，生成了迄今最大规模的长期射电天文档案之一。主要科学成果包括：1977 年探测到著名的 Wow! 信号；在巡天中累积记录了超过 4 万个窄带暂现事件；发现银河系中心附近存在异常集中的射电爆发；以及建立了连续射电监测的最长记录之一。在大耳朵关闭后，该项目的科学精神通过 Project Argus 和 Arecibo Wow! 项目得以延续。然而，尽管数据具有很高的科学价值，俄亥俄 SETI 项目收集的大部分数据尚未得到充分挖掘，为未来时间域射电天文和历史数据再分析留下了珍贵档案。
summary: The Ohio State University Radio Observatory (OSURO), known as the Big Ear, played a pivotal role in both radio astronomy and the Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence (SETI). Following the completion of the Ohio Sky Survey, the facility was repurposed in 1973 as the world's first full-time dedicated SETI observatory and operated continuously until its decommissioning in 1998. During this period, the Ohio SETI Program evolved from an 8-channel hydrogen-line receiver into increasingly sophisticated survey systems. Over three decades, these surveys covered approximately 70% of the radio sky using a largely consistent instrumental configuration, creating one of the most extensive long-term radio astronomy archives ever assembled. The program is best known for the detection of the Wow! Signal in 1977, but it also accumulated an archive of over 40,000 transient narrowband events, revealed unusual concentrations of radio bursts near the Galactic Center, and established one of the longest continuous radio monitoring records in astronomy. Following the closure of the Big Ear, its scientific legacy continued through Project Argus and, more recently, the Arecibo Wow! project. This paper provides an overview of the final decades of the Ohio SETI Program, including its instrumentation, survey strategies, scientific discoveries, and enduring impact on SETI, time-domain radio astronomy, and the preservation of historical astronomical data. Despite its scientific significance, most of the data collected by the Ohio SETI Program remains unexplored, leaving a unique archive available for future research.

title: MusE GAs FLOw and Wind (MEGAFLOW) XIV: Background-Galaxy Absorption Reveals Kiloparsec-Scale Structure in the Cool Circumgalactic Medium
background_knowledge: 星系周介质（Circumgalactic Medium, CGM）是填充在星系暗物质晕内、星际介质（ISM）之外的多相气体，其温度从约 10^4 K 的冷气体到 10^6-7 K 的热气体不等。CGM 扮演着星系“生态系统”的核心角色，它既是星系恒星形成所需气体的补给库，也是超新星和活动星系核反馈输出物质和能量的聚集地。冷气体（T ∼ 10^4 K）主要以离散的云团形式存在，通过吸收背景亮源（如类星体）的光谱来探测。传统的吸收线研究通常假设吸收云均匀且完全覆盖背景源，但实际云团的空间尺度可能远小于背景源的投影大小，导致部分覆盖效应，这使得吸收线特征依赖于背景源的尺寸。因此，利用不同大小的背景源（点状的类星体 vs. 延展的背景星系）可以有效约束冷气体云团的典型相干尺度，进而揭示 CGM 的小尺度结构，这对理解星系如何吸积和抛射气体至关重要。
contribution:
本研究利用 MEGAFLOW 巡天数据，首次通过几何方法直接约束了冷 CGM 中 MgII 吸收云团的相干尺度。具体工作与发现包括：
- 比较了背景星系（延展源，典型半光半径几 kpc）和背景类星体（点源，角径 ≲ 0.01 pc）的叠加 MgII 吸收线，发现在背景源尺寸小于前景云团相干尺度时，部分覆盖效应会导致探测比例降低，并使中值叠加等值宽度（EW）偏离均值。
- 对背景星系，均值和中值 EW 轮廓在误差范围内一致；而对类星体，两者差异显著，且随碰撞参数增大（尤其 > 100 kpc）越发明显。
- 进一步分析发现，对于较大的背景星系（中值半光半径 ≈ 6.6 kpc），均值和中值轮廓一致；对于较小的背景星系（≈ 1.5 kpc），两者出现差异，表明 MgII 云团的相干长度约为 2–7 kpc。
- 构建了离散云团分布的玩具模型，证实观测到的差异可自然解释为部分覆盖和波束平均的共同效应。
该结果提供了一种全新的、基于几何的测量手段，为 CGM 冷气体小尺度结构的研究开辟了新途径。
summary: The properties of the cool ($T\sim10^4$~K) gas in the circumgalactic medium (CGM) are closely linked to the physical mechanisms that create and maintain this multiphase medium. The cool CGM is thought to consist of discrete clouds, whose characteristic size is unknown. Here we present a geometric and direct approach to constrain the coherence scale of these cool structures using stacked MgII absorption lines measured against extended background galaxies and effectively point-like background quasars, whose sizes are a few kpc and $\lesssim$ 0.01 pc, respectively. When the background-source size is smaller than the coherence scale of the foreground clouds, incomplete covering lowers the detection fraction and causes the median stacked absorption to differ from the mean. For stacked MgII absorption against background galaxies, the mean and median equivalent width (EW) profiles are broadly consistent. For stacked MgII absorption against background quasars, by contrast, the median and mean EW profiles differ significantly, and more so as the impact parameter increases beyond 100 kpc. Furthermore, we find a tentative trend that the median and mean EW profiles are broadly consistent for large background galaxies (median half-light radius $\approx 6.6$ kpc), but differ for small background galaxies ($\approx 1.5$ kpc). This indicates that MgII clouds have a coherence length of $\sim$2-7~kpc. Using a toy model in which the CGM is populated with discrete cool clouds, we show that the observed differences arise naturally from the combination of partial covering and beam averaging. Our results provide a new geometry-based measure of the small-scale structure of cool CGM gas.

title: Spectroscopic analysis of RGB stars in nine open clusters
background_knowledge: 疏散星团（Open Clusters）是由同一分子云坍缩形成的、物理上相互关联的恒星群体，其成员星具有几乎相同的年龄和初始化学组成，但质量分布较广。这使得疏散星团成为检验恒星结构与演化模型的天然实验室。特别是，星团中的红巨星支（Red Giant Branch, RGB）恒星进入了演化晚期，其内部发生了一系列物理过程，如第一、第二上涌（dredge-up），以及非标准混合（extra-mixing）机制。这些过程会将核反应产物从恒星内部带到表面，改变大气中的轻元素丰度和同位素比值，例如碳、氮、氧（CNO）及其同位素 $^{12}$C/$^{13}$C、$^{16}$O/$^{17}$O、$^{16}$O/$^{18}$O 等。高分辨率光谱观测是探测这些化学指纹的直接手段。通过对不同质量、不同金属丰度的红巨星进行系统分析，天文学家可以量化热盐混合（thermohaline mixing）、旋转诱导混合（rotation-induced mixing）等非标准过程的发生条件与效率，从而为恒星内部角动量输运、元素核合成等关键问题提供观测约束。近年来，大型望远镜和高分辨光谱仪（如 CFHT/ESPaDOnS、VLT/CRIRES）的投入使用，使得对疏散星团中红巨星的高精度化学标度成为现实，极大推动了该领域的发展。
contribution: 本研究利用高分辨率、高信噪比的光学与近红外光谱，对 9 个疏散星团（NGC188、NGC2682、NGC3680、NGC5822、IC4756、NGC6633、NGC3532、NGC6281 和 NGC5460）中的 22 颗 K 型红巨星进行了径向速度和化学组成分析。其中 NGC188 的成员星使用 CFHT/ESPaDOnS 在光学波段观测，其余星团使用 VLT/CRIRES 在近红外波段观测。数据处理和光谱分析采用 IRAF、Turbospectrum 和 MOOG 等标准工具。获得的径向速度与文献值一致。研究重点通过 CNO 元素丰度以及 $^{12}$C/$^{13}$C、$^{16}$O/$^{17}$O、$^{16}$O/$^{18}$O 等同位素比值，探究红巨星内部的非标准混合过程。结果在光学和红外两个波段均支持热盐混合在红巨星支上确实发生，且其效率存在预期的质量依赖性；同时也支持主序阶段旋转诱导混合的贡献。此外，为了解释红巨星氧同位素比值的弥散，可能需要考虑 $^{17}$O 和 $^{18}$O 初始丰度的变化。
summary: Stellar clusters are crucial tools for studying the age, spatial distribution, dynamics, kinematics, and chemical composition of different Galactic stellar populations. In this work, we used red giant stars from open clusters to better understand the extra-mixing process through the CNO abundances and $^{12}$C/$^{13}$C, $^{16}$O/$^{17}$O and $^{16}$O/$^{18}$O isotopic ratios determined using high-quality spectra in the visible and near-infrared regions. We analysed the radial velocities and chemical composition of 22 K-type giant stars from nine open clusters (NGC188, NGC2682, NGC3680, NGC5822, IC4756, NGC6633, NGC3532, NGC6281, and NGC5460). High-resolution and high signal-to-noise spectra of stars in the NGC188 cluster were obtained with the ESPaDOnS spectrograph at the CFHT in the visible region. The stars in the other clusters were observed with the CRIRES spectrograph at the VLT. We used IRAF to compute radial velocities and Turbospectrum and MOOG for the chemical analysis. The values obtained for the radial velocities and abundances of the sample are similar to those found in the literature. The results in the visible and infrared support the occurrence and predicted mass dependence of thermohaline mixing on the red giant branch and of rotation-induced mixing on the main sequence. Variations of the initial abundances of $^{17}$O and $^{18}$O may be needed to explain the dispersion of the oxygen isotopic ratios in red giant stars.
